arts.ttl: Mallorca so close to getting a point in Barcelona
arts.sum: At times in the first half we were overwhelmed by the Barça trickery, but somehow Leo Roman repelled all boarders, denying Barcelona at least 10 scoring opportunities. Real Mallorca, decimated by injuries and suspensions, showed the same grit as they produced throughout this campaign in holding La Liga leaders Barcelona to just a 1-0 win on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Iniesta gives his verdict on Barcelona’s treble hopes
arts.sum: Barcelona legend Andres Iniesta has shared his verdict on the team’s hopes of winning the treble this season under Hansi Flick . “They are leaders in La Liga, Copa del Rey finalists and are in the semi-finals of the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Flick and Arrasate blown away by Pedri after Barca beat Mallorca
arts.sum: Hansi Flick and Jagoba Arrasate were both full of praise for Pedri after Barcelona beat Real Mallorca 1-0 in La Liga on Tuesday night . I haven’t seen a midfielder like him for a very long time,” he told reporters.

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Al-Hilal 'eyeing' audacious swoop for in-form attacker amid contract uncertainty
arts.sum: Saudi Arabian side Al-Hilal are reportedly eyeing a surprise swoop to sign a Barcelona attacker Raphinha, amid uncertainty surrounding his contract situation.

arts.ttl: Flick fine with tight Barça win on 40-shot night
arts.sum: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick said he wasn't worried his team could only muster one goal in Tuesday's 1-0 win over Mallorca despite racking up 40 shots.

arts.ttl: Olmo deserves the plaudits as Ansu and Pedri hit the right notes for Barça
arts.sum: With Mallorca setting out their stall in a 5-4-1 formation and Barcelona doing everything but score in a one-sided opening 45 minutes, Tuesday night’s game might well have turned into one of those horrible scenarios that have become oh so familiar for the Blaugranes over recent seasons. Given that it was only his 10th appearance of the season - four of which have been for five minutes or less - his future is clearly away from Barcelona, but on Tuesday night’s form that’s a real shame.

arts.ttl: Olmo strikes to put Barça seven clear of Madrid
arts.sum: Barcelona's Dani Olmo scored inside the first minute of the second half to earn a hard-fought 1-0 home win against Mallorca on Tuesday, extending their lead over Real Madrid at the top of the table to seven points with five games to go.

arts.ttl: ‘Like a brother to me’ – Gavi reveals delight for Barcelona teammate after Mallorca victory
arts.sum: Barcelona star Gavi has on Wednesday evening made clear his delight for teammate Ansu Fati. This of course comes after the latter was afforded nothing short of a shock start…

arts.ttl: Barcelona 1-0 Mallorca: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Dani Olmo extends lead at top of La Liga
arts.sum: Dani Olmo scores the decisive goal to fire Barcelona to a narrow 1-0 victory over Mallorca, extending the home side's lead at the top of La Liga.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star completed 97% of his passes in win over Mallorca
arts.sum: A member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona was responsible for an altogether noteworthy individual achievement during the club’s latest outing. The player in question? Iñigo Martínez.…
